name: Salesforce
description: Salesforce REST API for CRM and custom object work: SOQL/SOSL, object metadata, records, bulk-style composite calls, limits, and change windows.

tools.name: get_resources
tools.description: List top-level Salesforce REST resources available for this API version.

tools.name: get_limits
tools.description: Get current org API limits and remaining quota.

tools.name: list_objects
tools.description: List available standard and custom objects with metadata links.

tools.name: get_object_basic_info
tools.description: Get basic metadata URLs for one object, for example Lead, Account, Contact, Opportunity, Case, Task, or a custom object API name.

tools.name: describe_object
tools.description: Describe fields, record types, picklists, child relationships, createability, updateability, and searchability for an object.

tools.name: query_records
tools.description: Run a SOQL query. Example: SELECT Id, Name FROM Account LIMIT 10.

tools.name: query_all_records
tools.description: Run a SOQL query including deleted and archived records where Salesforce supports it.

tools.name: search_records
tools.description: Run a SOSL search. Example: FIND {Acme} IN ALL FIELDS RETURNING Account(Id, Name), Contact(Id, Name).

tools.name: get_record
tools.description: Get one record by object API name and record ID.

tools.name: create_record
tools.description: Create any Salesforce record. Pass objectName and fields as an object using Salesforce field API names.

tools.name: update_record
tools.description: Update any Salesforce record. Pass objectName, recordId, and fields using Salesforce field API names.

tools.name: delete_record
tools.description: Delete one Salesforce record.

tools.name: get_deleted_records
tools.description: Get deleted record IDs for an object in a time window. start and end must be ISO timestamps accepted by Salesforce.

tools.name: get_updated_records
tools.description: Get updated record IDs for an object in a time window. start and end must be ISO timestamps accepted by Salesforce.

tools.name: create_lead
tools.description: Convenience wrapper to create a Lead. Pass Salesforce Lead fields inside fields, for example LastName, Company, Email, Phone, Status, LeadSource.

tools.name: create_account
tools.description: Convenience wrapper to create an Account. Pass Salesforce Account fields inside fields, for example Name, Type, Industry, Phone, Website.

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Convenience wrapper to create a Contact. Pass Salesforce Contact fields inside fields, for example LastName, FirstName, Email, Phone, AccountId.

tools.name: create_opportunity
tools.description: Convenience wrapper to create an Opportunity. Pass Salesforce Opportunity fields inside fields, for example Name, StageName, CloseDate, AccountId, Amount.

tools.name: composite_request
tools.description: Run a Salesforce Composite API request. Pass the exact body documented by Salesforce.

tools.name: composite_batch
tools.description: Run a Salesforce Composite Batch request. Pass the exact body documented by Salesforce.

tools.name: composite_tree
tools.description: Create a tree of records for one object type. Pass objectName and the exact Salesforce tree body.

tools.name: composite_sobjects
tools.description: Create, update, upsert, or delete collections of records using the Salesforce sObject Collections endpoint. Pass the exact body documented by Salesforce.

tools.name: tooling_query
tools.description: Run a SOQL query against the Tooling API.
